name: RemediationCard disabled secondary omits accessibilityState disabled
description: [FCR 2026-06-21 · L6-15] Pressable disabled during cooldown but omits accessibilityState={{disabled}} — SR users get no announced disabled state. Fix: add accessibilityState.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: the cooldown-disabled RemediationCard secondary Pressable sets disabled and removes onPress but does not pass accessibilityState={disabled:true}, so assistive tech cannot announce the disabled state. Variants: cooldown active disabled state and cooldown inactive enabled state. Regression test: extend apps/mobile/src/components/progress/RemediationCard.test.tsx to assert accessibilityState.disabled is true during cooldown and absent/false when review retest is available.
